query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos WHERE estabelecimentoId IS NULL) as arquivos_sem_est,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos) as arquivos_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM convenios WHERE estabelecimentoId IS NULL) as convenios_sem_est,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM convenios) as convenios_total;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos WHERE estabelecimentoId IS NULL) as arquivos_sem_est,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos) as arquivos_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM convenios WHERE estabelecimentoId IS NULL) as convenios_sem_est,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM convenios) as convenios_total;
